summary: Tested NEW Passport Sharing Feature - Anonymous share links with 30-day expiration. All 14 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend verified: public shared passport page loads correctly, share dialog with generate/copy/revoke buttons works, error page for invalid links displays properly.
critical_code_review_comments: Backend share endpoints implemented correctly in /app/backend/routes/passport.py (lines 389-504)
POST /api/passport/share/create - generates unique share_id with 30-day expiration (VERIFIED)
GET /api/passport/shares - lists active share links for user (VERIFIED)
GET /api/passport/shared/{share_id} - PUBLIC endpoint returns anonymized passport (VERIFIED)
View count increments on each access (VERIFIED)
Multiple share links per passport supported (VERIFIED)
Frontend SharedPassportPage.jsx renders correctly without authentication
Frontend PassportView.jsx has Share button and dialog with generate/copy/revoke functionality
Anonymization verified: token_id, pseudo, email NOT exposed in shared passport
seed_data_creation: Test users created via API during pytest execution
context_for_next_testing_agent: Passport sharing feature fully tested. Backend tests in test_passport_sharing.py cover: create share link, list shares, revoke share, public view, view count, multiple links, anonymization. Frontend verified: SharedPassportPage displays anonymized passport without auth, PassportView has working share dialog with generate/copy/revoke buttons. Public URL format: /passport/shared/{share_id}

backend_apis: POST /api/passport/share/create - creates share link with 30-day expiration (PASSED)
frontend_pages: SharedPassportPage shows error for invalid links (PASSED)
Share dialog opens with generate button (PASSED)
Share dialog shows existing links with copy/revoke buttons (PASSED)
anonymization: token_id NOT exposed in shared passport (VERIFIED)
pseudo NOT exposed in shared passport (VERIFIED)
email NOT exposed in shared passport (VERIFIED)
share_info with expiry and view count exposed (VERIFIED)
